name: autoskillresearch
description: Self-improving Claude Code skills marketplace — skills that get better overnight

plugins.name: example-greeter
plugins.description: A friendly greeting skill that welcomes users and offers help

plugins.name: interrogate
plugins.description: Devil's advocate interrogation of features, ideas, and proposals — stress-tests thinking with structured, rigorous questioning

plugins.name: deep-research
plugins.description: Multi-phase deep research pipeline that discovers, validates, and synthesizes information from many sources into a comprehensive report

plugins.name: ux-cognitive-load
plugins.description: Cognitive load audit of UI code — analyzes components for Miller's Law, Hick's Law, progressive disclosure, WCAG cognitive guidelines, and common anti-patterns

plugins.name: ubiquitous-language
plugins.description: Extract and formalize DDD-style domain terminology into a structured glossary with bounded context support, rationale, and deprecated term tracking
